title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at EY India
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
